title: Accounting user can create and post an invoice from a confirmed sales order
description: This verifies the key accounting flow of turning a confirmed sales order into an invoice and posting it.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a confirmed sales order
Create an invoice from the sales order
Post the invoice
Verify the invoice is displayed
Verify the invoice is in a posted state

title: Sales admin can create a quotation with priced lines and submit it for approval
description: This verifies the core sales flow of building a quotation with line items, pricing, and submitting it into the approval process.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Create a new quotation
Add a quotation line for a product
Fill in valid line quantity and pricing values
Save the quotation
Submit the quotation for approval
Verify the quotation is displayed in the approval workflow
Verify the quotation line totals are displayed

title: Create and post an invoice from a confirmed order
description: An accounting user can create a regular invoice from a confirmed sales order and post it to generate journal items.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for the accounting user
Submit the login form
Navigate to the confirmed sales order
Create a regular invoice from the order
Open the new invoice
Post the invoice
Verify the invoice is posted
Verify journal items are generated

title: Accounting user can register payment for a posted invoice
description: This verifies that a posted invoice can receive a registered payment and remain visible as paid or partially paid in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a posted invoice
Register a payment
Verify the payment record is displayed
Verify the invoice payment state is updated

title: Admin can access permitted dashboard modules after sign in
description: This verifies that an admin can log in and see dashboard content that matches their granted menu access.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify permitted module cards are displayed

title: Admin sees only permitted dashboard modules
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin only sees dashboard cards for menus they are allowed to access and can open an allowed module from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard shows only the modules permitted for the signed-in user
Verify an allowed module can be opened from the dashboard

title: Register a payment for a posted invoice
description: This verifies that a user can register payment against a posted invoice and the invoice payment state updates after the payment is posted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential fields with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a posted invoice
Start payment registration for the invoice
Submit the payment registration
Verify the payment is posted and the invoice payment state is updated

title: Create and submit a quotation with line pricing
description: A sales user can create customer and product masters, set pricing defaults, build a quotation with line pricing, and submit it for approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for the sales user
Submit the login form
Navigate to the customer master form
Create a new customer
Navigate to the product master form
Create a new product
Navigate to the sales order form
Create a new quotation for the customer
Add the product line with a valid quantity
Submit the quotation for approval
Verify the quotation moves into approval waiting status

title: Approver can approve a quotation and see it transition forward
description: This verifies that approving a waiting quotation updates its workflow state to the next stage and keeps the record accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a quotation in the approval queue
Approve the quotation
Verify the quotation is displayed in the next workflow state
Verify the approval outcome is visible

title: Admin can create and save a new master data record
description: This verifies that a user can open a new master-data form, enter details, save the record, and return to a view state.

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a new master-data record form
Fill in the required fields with valid values
Save the record
Verify the created record is displayed
Verify the form is in view mode

title: Admin creates a custom user with menu access
description: This verifies that an admin can create a custom user account and save per-menu access rights for that user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the custom user management screen
Create a new custom user with a unique login, password, and position
Assign menu permissions to the new user
Save the user record
Verify the new custom user is saved
Verify the saved menu access rights are visible

title: Approve a quotation and progress it to sale
description: An approver can review a quotation in waiting approval, approve it, and see the order progress to an approved or sent state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for the approver user
Submit the login form
Navigate to the sales orders awaiting approval list
Open a quotation waiting approval
Approve the quotation
Verify the order transitions to an approved or sent state

steps.description: Navigate to /web/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Verify the delivery status is displayed

title: Register payment for a posted invoice and complete delivery

Submit the login form

Submit the login form

title: HR admin can create linked division, department, and position records

title: User changes their own password and signs in with the new one

Save the password change
Verify the password change is confirmed
Verify the user can authenticate with the new password

title: Create an employee with hierarchy and address data
description: A HR admin can create a new employee with linked division, department, position, and address details and see the employee saved successfully.

Save the employee record

Verify the linked hierarchy and address details are visible on the employee record

title: Send an invoice email with attachment

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a posted invoice
Open the email composer for the invoice
